errFileExists: File already exists, canceled to avoid overwriting: {path}
usage:
Usage:

new-post "filename" title:xxx/description:xxx/mdx:T/draft:F/featured:T/tags:[xxx,xxx]

Example:

new-post "astro-start"/title:Getting Started with Astro/description:An intro to Astro/mdx:T/draft:F/featured:F/tags:[astro,web]

Notes:
- filename must be the first argument
- The rest of the options can be in any order
- Arguments are separated by /
- You can also use spaces + \ to continue on a new line
- tags uses [tag1,tag2]
askFilenameWithSuggestion: Filename (no need for .md, press enter to use suggested "{suggested}"):
askTags: Tags (comma separated, leave blank to skip):
ownRepoSkip: ℹ️ Own repository detected, skipping postinstall
notAstro: ℹ️ astro dependency not detected, skipping script setup
alreadyManagedSkip: ℹ️ {path} already exists and is managed by this package, skipping
tookOver: ✅ Found an existing script with the same purpose, took it over: {path}
askAuthor: Author name (press enter to skip the author field):
